Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
4.13.4 A List of Achaean Languages
(see HELP LANGUAGE TEACHERS, HELP LANGUAGE FLUENCY, and
HELP
LANGUAGE
LEARNING
)
The Common Tongue
-----------------
Achaean
, also known as common. This language is always known by all adventurers in
Achaea
to perfect fluency.
Racial
Languages
----------------
Racial languages may be known by virtue of one's
race
, or may be learnt via language
study
.
Atavian
Dragon
Dwarven
Fayad
Grook
Horkvali
Human
Mhun
Rajamalan
Satyri
Sireni
Tash'la
Triton
Trollish
Tsol'aa
Xorani
Other
Known Languages
---------------------
None of these languages can be learnt by
studying
. Each is gained by a specific race or
group
and is not teachable.
City
: Ashtani, Cyrenese, Eleusian, Hashani, Mhaldorian,
Targossas
Divine
Tsol'dasi - Learned in the City of
Istarion
.
*
Vertani
- Learned by some involved in the Vertani invasion
event
.
*Karthic - Learned by some during the Kartha invasion event.
Primordial
Unknown Languages
-----------------
Other languages may be discovered. One aspect of the discovery will be determining a method for their study.
(see HELP LANGUAGE TEACHERS, HELP LANGUAGE FLUENCY, and HELP LANGUAGE LEARNING)
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
